title: reflect-kb learning frontmatter (v4)
description: YAML frontmatter for a reflect-kb learning document (documents/*.md). The v4 spec pins the ten fields enumerated here; additional fields are tolerated so real-world provenance/ingest metadata survives validation.

category.description: Free-form classifier (e.g. build-errors, architecture, memories, feedback). CODEOWNERS routing keys off this value.

tags.description: Retrieval tags (lowercase kebab or short words). No semantic meaning beyond boosting recall.

symptoms.description: Error messages, stack traces, or observable signals that match this learning. Used for symptom-based retrieval.

root_cause.description: One-sentence diagnosis of *why* the problem happens.

key_insight.description: One-sentence actionable takeaway — what the next engineer should do differently.

created.description: ISO-8601 date the learning was first captured (YYYY-MM-DD).

confidence.description: Confidence tier. HIGH auto-commits to team KB; MED/LOW goes through PR review.

language.description: Primary programming language (e.g. python, rust, typescript). Lowercase preferred.

framework.description: Primary framework / runtime (e.g. tokio, react, django). Lowercase preferred.
